passive.name: Clean Cuts
passive.description: After using an ability, Xayah's next basic attacks will hit all targets along their path and leave a Feather.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} shot by {{ci|Xayah}} will linger in the ground at max range for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Xayah's''' ability casts generate three stacks of ''Clean Cuts'', stacking up to five times. '''Xayah's''' basic attacks consume a stack to instead shoot a {{as|Feather|buzzword}} that deals {{as|the attack's damage|pdamage}} to the target and {{as|physical damage}} to other enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Innate - Lover's Leap:}} '''Xayah''' and {{ci|Rakan}} can join each other's {{si|Recall}} to complete together.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} shot by '''Xayah''' will linger in the ground at maximum range for 6 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Xayah's''' [[Champion ability|ability]] casts generate 3 [[stack]]s of ''Clean Cuts'', lasting for 8 seconds, refreshing on subsequent casts, and stacking up to 5 times. '''Xayah's''' [[basic attack]]s are empowered to each consume a stack {{tip|on-attack}} to instead shoot a {{as|Feather|buzzword}} that deals the {{as|attack's damage}} to the primary target and {{as|{{pp|key=%|30 to 50 for 3|1 to 13}} AD}} {{as|physical damage}} to other enemies hit, with the secondary damage also {{tip|critical strike|critically striking}} if the main attack does.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Innate - Lover's Leap:}} If either '''Xayah''' or {{ci|Rakan}} is channeling {{si|Recall}}, the other may move nearby and channel their own to join alongside them. '''Both''' reach base at the time of which the initiator's {{si|Recall}} completes.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tt|1000|Feather landing location from Xayah's location, taken at the time of the attack dealing damage to main target}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} will stop upon being intercepted by {{tip|projectile|projectile-blocking}} effects.
** {{Pending for test}}: {{tip|homing projectile destruction|Missile popping}} before and after striking the primary target.
* After striking their target, the attack will proceed in a line in the same direction it was already flying.
** If the target is more than 1000 units from '''Xayah''' when the empowered attack hits them, the attack will not keep flying in a line and drop the {{as|Feather|buzzword}} at their location immediately.
** Unlike similar effects, the homing and line trajectories use the same missile.
* All her {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} on the ground will be destroyed when '''Xayah''' {{tip|death|dies}}, and while she is dead, missiles that are still in flight will not spawn new ones, either.
* ''Clean Cut's'' feathers will spawn even if the basic attack is {{tip|blocked}}.
* ''Clean Cut's'' hit can be {{tip|dodge|dodged}} by or {{tip|blind|missed}} against the primary target. 
** This will not prevent the missile from continuing on its path nor from dealing damage to secondary targets. The damage cannot be dodged as or missed against a secondary target.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[structures]] nor [[ward]]s.
** The duration will be refreshed when starting the attack windup against them.
* The number of ''Clean Cuts'' stacks available is represented by a [[File:Xayah Passive Feather.png|20px|link=]] feather counter in her ammo bar, visible to the player only.

Q.name: Double Daggers
Q.description: Xayah throws two damaging daggers that also drop Feathers she can recall.
Q.tooltip: Xayah throws two daggers, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage each and leaving two Feathers. Targets hit after the first take {{ multihitdamage }} damage from each dagger.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xayah}} barrages out two {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} that each deal {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xayah''' barrages two {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} in the target direction that each deal {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage Per Hit|{{ap|45 to 105}} {{as|(+ 50% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Total Physical Damage|{{ap|45*2 to 105*2}} {{as|(+ 100% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: Targets hit after the first take 50% reduced damage.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Reduced Damage per Hit|{{ap|45/2 to 105/2}} {{as|(+ 25% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Total Reduced Damage|{{ap|45 to 105}} {{as|(+ 50% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.cast time: {{pp|type='''bonus''' attack speed|round=3|0.25;0.033*7;0.033*6;0.033*5;0.033*4;0.1|key1=%|0;27.15;74.29;121.43;168.58;214.3|formula=0.25-(0.07 per 100% '''bonus''' attack speed). ''This is capped at 60% reduction at 214.3% '''bonus''' attack speed.''|color=attack speed}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Daggers shoot from '''Xayah's''' left and right side.
* Because of the usual tick intervals of the server, ''Double Daggers' ''minimum cast time is typically reached at {{as|{{fd|168.58}}% '''bonus''' attack speed}} already, for a cast time of {{fd|0.132}} seconds (from the default {{rutngt|0.25}}), or the duration of 4 game ticks.
** If the first 3 game ticks happen to be slightly longer than normal, the minimum cast time of {{fd|0.1}} seconds can actually be reached in very rare cases because of that.
* '''Xayah''' is unable to declare basic attacks for a set duration during the cast time of ''Double Daggers''. The lock out duration is reduced by {{ft|{{fd|0.007}} seconds per every {{as|1% '''bonus''' attack speed}}|1 second per every {{as|140% '''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.
* The {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} will stop upon being intercepted by {{tip|projectile|projectile-blocking}} effects.
* As the feathers are forming, they will deal damage in a small area around '''Xayah's''' before firing.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will only block a single instance of damage.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

W.name: Deadly Plumage
W.description: Xayah creates a storm of blades that increase her Attack Speed and damage while also granting her Move Speed if she attacks a champion.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xayah}} empowers herself for a few seconds, gaining {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and causing her basic attacks to strike a second time, dealing '''reduced''' damage.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Whenever she hits an enemy {{tip|champion}}, she briefly gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: ''If {{ci|Rakan}} is nearby upon cast, he also becomes empowered and gains the {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} at the same time as '''Xayah'''.''
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xayah''' enters a frenzy for 4 seconds, gaining {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and empowering her basic attacks to strike a second time, dealing 20% damage.
wiki_detail.description2: Whenever '''Xayah''' hits an enemy {{tip|champion}} with the strike, she gains {{sti|ms|{{as|30% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: ''If {{ci|Rakan}} is nearby upon cast, he also becomes empowered, and gains the {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} at the same time as '''Xayah'''.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The lesser bolts count as additional sources of single target physical damage, and will apply bonus stacks of {{ii|The Black Cleaver}} and {{ri|Electrocute}}.<!--Needs to be reconfirmed, seems to be fixed-->
* The lesser bolts from {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}} will also deal 20% increased damage, which is represented with additional lesser bolts. The damage dealt by ''Deadly Plumage's'' bolts is 20% of the fired bolt from {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}}, ''not'' of the initial basic attack.
* The lesser bolts deal 20% of the triggering basic attack's damage, not based on her {{sti|{{as|attack damage}}}}. Thus, if the basic attack is a {{tip|critical strike}}, the lesser bolt will also deal increased damage.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[ward]]s.
_comments: Needs to be reconfirmed, seems to be fixed

E.name: Bladecaller
E.description: Xayah calls back all her dropped Feathers dealing damage and rooting enemies.
E.tooltip: Xayah calls all Feathers back to her, dealing {{ featherdamage }} physical damage each. If {{ featherthreshold }} or more Feathers hit an enemy, they are Rooted for {{ rootduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xayah}} recalls all {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} to shoot back to her, each dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit based on her {{as|{{sti|critical strike chance}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: An enemy hit by at least three {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} is briefly {{tip|root|rooted}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xayah''' recalls all planted {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} to shoot back to her, each dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, increased by {{as|{{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=critical strike chance|0 to 75 for 11|0 to 100|formula=0.75 × critical strike chance}}|critical chance}}. ''Bladecaller'' deals 50% damage to {{tip|minions}}.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage Per Feather|{{ap|55 to 95}} {{as|(+ 60% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Minion Damage Per Feather|{{ap|55/2 to 95/2}} {{as|(+ 30% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: An enemy takes {{pp|type=previous feathers hit|key=%|100 to 10 by 5|x-1|formula=100%-(5% per previous feather hit). ''This is capped at 10% damage.''}} damage from a {{as|Feather|buzzword}}.
wiki_detail.description3: A target hit by at least three {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} is {{tip|root|rooted}} for {{fd|1.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Enemies can be hit by an individual {{as|Feather|buzzword}} only once per pass.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} that are 'in flight' will be called to '''Xayah''' too, but only once they've landed normally first.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will only block a single instance of damage.
* This ability cannot be ranked at [[Experience (champion)|Level]] 1.
* The damage dealt by ''Bladecaller'' follows a diminishing returns formula not mentioned in the ability's description, successively reducing extra damage from feathers beyond the first.
** This formula is: 
*** For feathers <=19: Damage of one feather{{times}}(n{{minus}}{{fd|0.05}}{{times}}(n{{minus}}1){{divided by}}2{{times}}n) where n stands for the number of feathers hit.
*** For feathers >=20: Damage of one feather{{times}}(19{{minus}}{{fd|0.05}}{{times}}(19{{minus}}1){{divided by}}2{{times}}19{{plus}}0.1{{times}}(n{{minus}}19)) where n stands for the number of feathers hit.
** For example, at rank 1 ''Bladecaller'' deals {{pp|type=feathers hit|55*(x-0.05*(x-1)/2*x) for 19}}.
* ''Bladecaller'' cannot be cast without a {{as|Feather|buzzword}} on the ground.

R.name: Featherstorm
R.description: Xayah leaps into the air becoming untargetable and throwing out a fan of daggers, dropping Feathers she can recall.
R.tooltip: Xayah leaps into the air becoming Untargetable and Ghosted for 1.5 seconds before raining down daggers that deal {{ damage }} physical damage and leave behind a line of Feathers.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xayah}} leaps into the air and briefly becomes {{tip|untargetable}}, then throws five {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} in a cone in the target direction that each deal {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xayah''' leaps into the air, becoming {{tip|untargetable}} and {{tip|ghosted}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds. After 1 second, she shoots 5 {{as|Feathers|buzzword}} in a cone in the target direction that deal {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: '''''Xayah''' is unable to basic attack or cast abilities during Featherstorm, but can still move.''
